title: It's Real Gold
description: Makes every gold texture richer, darker and more closely resembling actual gold.
body:
Gold is a rare and beatiful element. It's been hoarded by kings and queens throughout history for it's worth and magnificent color. It's been crafted into jewelries, crowns and all sorts of valuable items that displayed wealth and power for a reason. Certainly not because it reminded them of **DEHYDRATED PISS**. This texture pack aims at bringing that rich, dark gold color into Minecraft.

![Comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/sZ9UVe3u/images/b2b76802ff9997c233a79ea1fbb011f592fdf149.png)

Some more [Gallery Images](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/its-real-gold/gallery)
